purpose: One selected per-run summary every lane reads first, instead of each lane re-reading AGENTS.md / provider_routing.json / issue memory / full transcript. Lanes follow source_refs only when they need more.
produced_by: viewer-server reconcile_run_artifacts() -> write_context_capsule() (a MUTATION; never written on the GET /api/run path)

task.raw: str — operator_message.original_message (user's original text, never deleted)
task.refined: str — operator_message.refined_message (refined prompt for the main orchestrator)
task.mode: str — light | normal (derived from request_weight; caps issue selection)

fields.relevant_policy: list[str] — short, static-ish hard rules every lane must honor
fields.relevant_issues: list[{id, summary, countermeasure}] — top-k from issue memory (matching_issues_for_text); capped at 3 (light) / 8 (normal)
fields.current_artifacts: list[{name, status, trust}] — files present in the run dir; trust is provenance.source_type if stamped else 'unknown'
fields.missing_evidence: list[str] — expected-but-absent evidence artifacts (e.g. worker-result.json, validator-result.json)
